question: How long does delivery take on average?
sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(TIMESTAMP_DIFF(delivered_at, shipped_at, HOUR)) / 24, 1) AS avg_ship_to_door_days FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.order_items` WHERE delivered_at IS NOT NULL AND shipped_at IS NOT NULL
analyst_notes: Delivery time = shipped_at to delivered_at, over DELIVERED items only — undelivered items have NULLs and silently vanish from AVG, which is correct here but say so (survivorship: slow in-transit items aren't counted yet).
author: claude-draft
